title: Use of English – 2025 Acceso Titular A

questions.prompt: I didn’t tell you because I wasn’t sure.
answers: If I had been sure, I would have told you.
If I'd been sure, I would have told you.
If I had been sure, I'd have told you.
If I'd been sure, I'd have told you.
If I had been sure, I would've told you.
If I'd been sure, I would've told you.
If I had been sure, I'd've told you.
If I'd been sure, I'd've told you.

questions.prompt: The laundry is too wet to be taken off the clothesline.
answers: The laundry is not dry enough to be taken off the clothesline.
The laundry isn't dry enough to be taken off the clothesline.

questions.prompt: I would prefer not to go on the field trip.
answers: I would rather not go on the field trip.
I'd rather not go on the field trip.

questions.prompt: They can’t leave the class unless the teacher gives them permission.
answers: They are not allowed to leave the class unless the teacher gives them permission.
They aren't allowed to leave the class unless the teacher gives them permission.
They are not allowed to leave the class unless the teacher gives them permission.
They aren't allowed to leave the class unless the teacher gives them permission.
They are not allowed to leave the class if the teacher does not give them permission.
They aren't allowed to leave the class if the teacher does not give them permission.
They are not allowed to leave the class if the teacher doesn't give them permission.
They aren't allowed to leave the class if the teacher doesn't give them permission.

questions.prompt: I think they should go home.
answers: I think it is time they went home.
I think it's time they went home.
I think it is time for them to go home.
I think it's time for them to go home.

questions.prompt: They consider that Manuel is an expert on manga.
answers: Manuel is considered to be an expert on manga.
Manuel's considered to be an expert on manga.
Manuel is considered an expert on manga.
Manuel's considered an expert on manga.

questions.prompt: He wondered why Lisa was so curious about stick insects.
answers: Why is Lisa so curious about stick insects? he wondered.
Why's Lisa so curious about stick insects? he wondered.

questions.prompt: Let’s go to Scotland next summer for a vacation.
answers: How about going to Scotland next summer for a vacation

questions.prompt: Alice hasn’t smoked for three months.
answers: Alice gave up smoking three months ago

questions.prompt: Urban Flora sometimes delivers gardenia bouquets to Anna.
answers: Anna sometimes gets gardenia bouquets delivered by Urban Flora

questions.prompt: Alina cannot speak English as well as Dimitri.
answers: Dimitri speaks English better than Alina
Dimitri speaks better English than Alina

questions.prompt: Masha will be disappointed if she doesn’t get top marks in the exam.
answers: Unless Masha gets top marks in the exam, she will be disappointed
Unless Masha gets top marks in the exam, she'll be disappointed
